name: SCWorx Corp.
summary: PART I Corporate Information SCWorx, LLC (n/k/a SCW FL Corp.) (SCW LLC) was a privately held limited liability company which was organized in Florida on November 17, 2016. On December 31, 2017, SCW LLC acquired Primrose Solutions, LLC (Primrose), a Delaware limited liability company, which became its wholly-owned subsidiary and focused on developing functionality for the software now used and sold by SCWorx Corp.
